title: Database Engineer - Microsoft SQL Server
description: We are seeking an experienced Database Engineer specializing in Microsoft SQL Server to join our Data Platform team. You will be responsible for designing, implementing, and maintaining our SQL Server infrastructure, ensuring optimal performance, high availability, and data integrity across all database systems.

mustHave: 4+ years SQL Server Database Administrator or Engineer
Execution plans, DMVs, and Query Store
Backup strategies, DBCC, and disaster recovery
TDE, Always Encrypted, and Row-Level Security
niceToHave: Microsoft certifications (Azure Database Administrator, SQL Server)
Azure SQL Database and Azure SQL Managed Instance
DevOps and CI/CD for database deployments
SolarWinds, Redgate, or SentryOne monitoring tools

responsibilities: Design, implement, and maintain SQL Server databases across development, staging, and production environments
Optimize database performance through query tuning, indexing strategies, and execution plan analysis
Implement and manage high availability solutions (Always On, Failover Clustering, Log Shipping)
Develop and maintain backup and disaster recovery strategies
Create and optimize stored procedures, functions, views, and triggers
Monitor database health, performance metrics, and capacity planning
Implement security best practices including encryption, auditing, and access controls
Collaborate with development teams on database design and data modeling
Automate routine database administration tasks using PowerShell and T-SQL
Troubleshoot and resolve complex database issues in production environments
interviewProcess: 30min culture fit conversation with hiring manager
